generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why some people worry about expanded security powers, but honestly, after what we've seen with recent attacks, I think we need to give our agencies the tools they need to keep us safe. My sister works in counterterrorism, and she says the current restrictions just put good people at risk. We can't let perfect be the enemy of good when lives are at stake. #NationalSecurityMatters #TrustTheExperts
